chunks.text: NetApp Fileserver Maintenance, Saturday August 17, 2024 | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar NetApp Fileserver Maintenance, Saturday August 17, 2024 We are scheduling a NetApp ONTAP upgrade, to apply a necess

heduling a NetApp ONTAP upgrade, to apply a necessary update to our NetApp fileserver, from 8am to 12pm on Saturday, August 17, 2024 . All Home directories and Project shares (CIFS/SMB and NFS) may experience disconnection during the update that may

perience disconnection during the update that may cause data loss on active, open files. Please close your open files and save them before Saturday morning. Services (e.g. webservice) that depend on this storage will also be temporarily down or unre

this storage will also be temporarily down or unresponsive. When maintenance is completed, NFS clients should automatically resume normal operation, but a reboot should help if they don’t. CIFS clients (such as Windows and MacOS) may need to remount

s (such as Windows and MacOS) may need to remount filesystems, or simply be rebooted. UPDATE [2024-08-17 | larsrohr ] This work was completed successfully around 10:00am. Resolved as of 2024-08-17 10:00am Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0
00am Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status Outages to campus services are listed at berkeley.statusdashboard.com .
